clusters.justification: These terms reflect the overarching evaluation and autonomic processing of emotional valence and arousal, sharing co-activation across macroscopic limbic and salience neurocircuitry.
Grounded in frontostriatal and dopaminergic reward architectures, this functional axis computes incentive salience and integrates subjective preferences to drive motivated, goal-directed behavior.

Supported by the default mode network, this domain encapsulates the internally directed processing required to construct abstract meta-representations of identities, social inferences, and personal narratives.
